reviews.description: Jan 20, 2026 · Looking for an affordable mascara that gives volume, length AND definition without clumping or flaking? Vivienne Sabó Cabaret Premiere Mascara is a French beauty favorite — and now I... Aug 16, 2024 · Vivienne Sabó Paris – Classic French Mascara is a great choice for anyone who is craving for defined voluminous lashes. This every day classic mascara provides thicker, longer and gives fanned lashes. The smudge proof and long lasting formula of this product doesn’t flake or transfer. Vivienne Sabó Cabaret Première Mascara delivers beautiful volume and definition without clumping. The formula is lightweight and comfortable to wear all day, and it doesn’t feel heavy or stiff on the lashes. I love how black and opaque it is—it makes lashes look longer and fuller with just one or two coats. Giving your lashes artistic, show-stopping volume has never been so easy! The light and elastic formula makes them dramatically full. The unique Hytrel plastic brush perfectly colors and curls your lashes. Flawlessly curled lashes with just one twist of your wrist! The golden tube will be an elegant accessory to your unique style. Does cabaret Mascara make your lashes longer? Cabaret mascara not only transforms your lashes, but it also enhances their natural beauty. Say goodbye to harsh, lackluster lashes and hello to the transformative power of Cabaret mascara. Try it today and discover the ultimate length, volume, and definition for your lashes. Is Vivienne sabó cabaret première a good Mascara? Tucked among the usual suspects (mostly L'Oréal and Maybelline classics) was the Vivienne Sabó Cabaret Première mascara, with 1,511 reviews, the majority of them five stars. Scrolling through the comments, it was clear I was missing out on a hidden gem. Is cabaret Mascara cruelty-free? Whether you prefer a dramatic, glam look, false lash or a natural, subtle look, Cabaret mascara has got you covered. Cabaret Première mascara is formulated to be delicate on your natural lashes. Not only is Cabaret mascara cruelty-free, but its lightweight formula also ensures that your lashes won't feel weighed down or clumpy. How many coats of Cabaret première lashes do I Need? EVERYDAY CLASSIC MASCARA for natural-looking volume and color. DEFINED & VOLUMIZED lashes with just one coat of Cabaret Première. Or, build the look for even thicker, fanned lashes . Aug 29, 2017 · Highly popular Vivienne Sabó Cabaret Première mascara in two shades on my eyelashes. The legendary product is close to the ideal one! Pros: affordable, boosts volume, doesn't flake, lengthens lashes. Cons: eyelashes stick together a little bit. ♡ Good day everyone ♡. I have the Vivienne Sabó Cabaret Première mascara in two shades: black and purple.
